author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan shimashita' Unveils Additional Cast, Ending Theme, First Promo
The official website of the Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan shimashita (The Forsaken Saintess and her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World) television anime unveiled additional cast, the ending theme, first promo, and a key visual (pictured) on Thursday. The anime series adapting Yoneori's fantasy gourmet light novel is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX, followed by BS Nippon Television, CBC Television, and AT-X in July 2026. Cast Ed: Shouya Chiba (Do...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Neko to Ryuu' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Amara's Neko to Ryuu (The Cat and the Dragon) light novel revealed additional cast, a second key visual (pictured), and promotional video on Thursday. The anime series will premiere on Tokyo MX, BS NTV, and Yomiuri TV in July 2026. Cast Gally: Atsumi Tanezaki (Silent Witch) Annerossa: Chika Anzai (Tsuihousha Shokudou e Youkoso!) Stan: Junya Enoki (Toumei Otoko to Ningen Onna) Jin-Gu Oh (Ooi! Tonbo) is helming the anime at OLM. Mits...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kuroiwa Medaka ni Watashi no Kawaii ga Tsuujinai 2nd Season' Reveals New Staff, Teaser Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ran Kuze's Kuroiwa Medaka ni Watashi no Kawaii ga Tsuujinai (Medaka Kuroiwa Is Impervious to My Charms) manga revealed new staff, teaser visual (pictured) and promotional video for its second season on Thursday. Voice actors Yuu Serizawa (Osananajimi to wa Love Comedy ni Naranai) and Ryouta Iwasaki (Yuzuki-san Chi no Yonkyoudai.) are returning to the main cast as Mona Kawai and Medaka Kuroiwa, respectively. author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mebius Dust' Reveals Main Cast, Opening Theme, Summer 2026 Premiere
The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime revealed the main cast and opening theme on Thursday. The anime will premiere in July 2026. Cast Araki: Yuuto Takenaka ([Oshi no Ko] 3rd Season) Stella: Nene Hieda (Summer Pockets) Olga: Haruka Satou (Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.) Singer-songwriter Leo Ieiri (Code Geass: Fukkatsu no Lelouch) is performing the opening theme "Mobius." Tarou Iwasaki (Amaama to Inazuma) is directing the anime at Doga Kobo, with Yoriko Tomita (Nige...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Yuuji Oono, Music Composer of 'Lupin the Third', Dies at 84
Yuuji Oono, the acclaimed jazz pianist and composer renowned for scoring the anime series Lupin III, died on May 4, 2026. He was 84. His agency, Office Augusta, announced his passing in an official statement on May 13, expressing heartfelt gratitude for the support and kindness shown to him throughout his lifetime. The statement added that up until just before he died, Oono had been living his life normally until he passed away peacefully while sleeping. Private funeral and memorial services wer...
